fixtures.name: normal-baseline
fixtures.purpose: Healthy allocation, evaluation, and routing baseline with no unallocated load.

fixtures.name: overload-scale-recommendation
fixtures.purpose: Overload pressure that accepts available capacity and recommends scale-up for unallocated load.

fixtures.name: single-server-failure-recovery
fixtures.purpose: One server fails, traffic routes around it, allocation excludes it, and recovery re-enters routing.

fixtures.name: all-unhealthy-degradation
fixtures.purpose: All servers unavailable with controlled no-capacity and no-route responses.

fixtures.name: mixed-incident-replay
fixtures.purpose: A multi-step incident mixing routing, overload, failure, evaluation, recovery, and allocation.

fixtures.name: invalid-scenario
fixtures.purpose: Unsupported event type contract fixture for controlled bad-request behavior.
